---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation
What problem would this solve, or what would it enable?

## Proposed solution
Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about.

## Scope
Which layer would this touch: ETL / Analytics / Forecasting / App / Docs / Tooling?

## Additional context
Mockups, references, or examples.
